title: KZ-1 runners repair
objective: Read governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md first. Apply Claude KZ-1/TZ-1 only: repair truncated/no-op runner skeletons, not reports. Inspect runner-like Python files under governance, scripts, runtime, runners, excluding archive/codex/cache dirs. For runner-like files missing def main(), missing __main__, syntax-broken, or <=5 nonblank lines, replace with safe STUB_RUNNABLE skeleton that imports, exposes main(), prints structured JSON, release_pass=false, and does not claim functional proof. Add executable test tests/governance/test_kz1_runners_skeleton.py verifying runner-like files parse and have main/__main__. Update AGENT_CONTEXT with one concise KZ-1 entry and next action KZ-2 SSOT duplicates. Do not create BEM reports, proof-by-report, Release PASS, issue comments, schedule triggers, or codex/proofs-only success. No issue comments.
